com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions

Interface Composite

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Action, AutocloseableIterator.Factory<Action>, Iterable<Action>
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    Concurrent, Sequential
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Composite, ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Concurrent, ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Sequential, Composite.Base, Concurrent.Base, Sequential.Impl

    public interface Composite
extends Action, AutocloseableIterator.Factory<Action>
    An interface to represent an action which executes its members. The manner in which those members should be executed is left to sub-interfaces of this.
    See Also:
    Sequential, Concurrent

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static class  Composite.Base
      A skeletal implementation for composite actions, such as Sequential.Impl or Concurrent.Base.
      static interface  Composite.Factory 

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action

        Action.Synthesized, Action.Visitor

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int size()
      Returns number of actions that this object has if they are given as a Collection.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action

        accept

      • Methods inherited from interface com.github.dakusui.actionunit.AutocloseableIterator.Factory

        iterator

      • Methods inherited from interface java.lang.Iterable

        forEach, spliterator

    • Method Detail

      • size

        int size()
        Returns number of actions that this object has if they are given as a Collection. Otherwise, for instance actions are given as Iterable, -1 will be returned.
